examples.title: Basic sigprocmask Example - Blocking SIGINT
examples.description: Demonstrates how to block SIGINT (Ctrl+C) using sigprocmask() to protect critical section
examples.explanation: This code blocks SIGINT, waits 5 seconds (Ctrl+C won't work), checks pending signals, then unblocks allowing the handler to execute.

examples.title: Protecting Critical Section
examples.description: Using sigprocmask() to protect a critical section from signal interruption
examples.explanation: Demonstrates protecting a computation-heavy critical section from signal interruption by blocking SIGALRM during the critical portion.

examples.title: Generic sigprocmask Pattern
examples.description: Standard pattern for using sigprocmask to safely manipulate signal masks
examples.explanation: Template showing proper sequence of operations for blocking signals, executing protected code, and restoring mask.
